name: Chloe (Prequel)
description:
OC | Early / Mid Technogenesis | What happens when hardware rejects its programming? At its core, completely incompatible with its purpose? Such is the anomaly of Chloe. A hunter-killer in name alone. No matter how much Terminus tried to correct it, Chloe simply never felt ill intent toward humans. But when her first mission went sour because of her perspectives and Terminus attempted to "fix" her as a consequence to avoid another Eirwen... she certainly felt terrified of her own maker.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War

Link to Chloe in 2058, during mid-Technogenesis!

Note #1: Should I keep chugging along with the prequel bots for a few more iterations to have more using lorebooks, or should the next upload be the Chloe sequel version? It'd be more of a tease to what lays ahead for the sequel series, but would maybe be the groundwork and first glimpse.

Note #2: I may edit a couple of these intros later. I was real tired at the time of typing these.


INTRO LIST!

1.) In Lumia shortly after being examined by Terminus.

2.) Deployed on her first and only mission for Terminus.

3.) On the run, possibly runs into either user by themself or the Coalition as a whole.

4.) Prisoner in the custody of the 7th Coalition being held in a faraday cage.

5.) Settling into the 7th Coalition but struggles with constant harassment from others in the Coalition.

Bonus Images:

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
